name: Responsive Industries Limited
summary: Responsive Industries Limited manufactures and sells polyvinyl chloride (PVC) based products for household and commercial purposes in India and internationally. The company's products primarily include vinyl flooring, synthetic leather, luxury vinyl tile, and shipping ropes for various applications, such as upholstery, footwear, automotive, and others. It serves healthcare, hospitality, safety and transport, retail and offices, education, and sports industries. The company was formerly known as Responsive Polymers Limited and changed its name to Responsive Industries Limited in 2007. The company was incorporated in 1982 and is based in Thane, India.
